reviews.comment:
hoy intente usar el baño...lo que era, total falta de higiene y salubridad. no habia papel, todo sucio, no habia jabon. un desastre

(Translated by Google)
Today I tried to use the bathroom... what a mess! There was a total lack of hygiene and sanitation. No toilet paper, everything was dirty, no soap. A disaster.
